creator: martin.dieringer@gmx.de
text:
cyclic conflict?


--->  Building '/usr/ports/print/texlive-base'
===>   texlive-base-20140525_4 depends on executable: weave - not found

===>   tex-web2c-20140525 depends on shared library: libopenjpeg.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libopenjpeg.so.1.5.2)
===>   tex-web2c-20140525 depends on shared library: libpng15.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libpng15.so.15)
===>   tex-web2c-20140525 depends on shared library: libzzip.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libzzip.so.13.0.62)

Installing tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1...
pkg-static: tex-kpathsea-6.2.0_1 conflicts with texlive-base-20140525_3 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/kpsewhere
